speaker: MATT
raw_text: One minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius has got something for us, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Hunter's Mark on the Elder Brain and shoot Hail of Thorns into the Elder Brain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yes! I like that idea!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start bringing down the temple! Are we okay with that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're still in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Not while we're still in it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I mean it'll take some time, I'm sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or it could happen really quick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys do notice-- you guys are beginning to see what looks like shadows seemingly coming out from the outside, and you hear what seems to be slight cackling of things sort of in the doorways. So you're shooting Hail of Thorns down into the Elder Brain? Go ahead and roll for the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 19 will hit, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to be dead in ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What, the teleportation one?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: We'll talk about it later. Plan B, it's ten minutes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Pretty sure it's one minute

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius has got something for us, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Hunter's Mark on the Elder Brain and shoot Hail of Thorns into the Elder Brain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Spellcasting time  one minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or it could happen really quick.

So you're shooting Hail of Thorns down into the Elder Brain? Go ahead and roll for the attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to be dead in ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What, the teleportation one?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: We'll talk about it later. Plan B, it's ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Sure!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pretty sure it's one minute

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, does this mean you can go and we'll distract?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No, don't look at it! You said one minute, that's the DM, DM is god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I roll regular damage, plus the Hail of Thorns?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I thought it was.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If someone asks you if you're a god--

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: You say yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You shouldn't look! You shouldn't waste your time.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, I'm pretty sure-- if the item says "attunement" on it, you have to spend a short rest attuning yourself with the weapon. If either of them does.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Whatever, it'll make it harder. Right, that's my turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, do recall that mind flayers do levitate.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Aw. (groans) God! Maybe not now, they don't?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Tiberius, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, okay--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can also see forms swarming through the other doorway over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Teleport us!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: This isn't good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fly us! Get us out.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: How far? Scanlan's only like a foot away from me, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm right next to him!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Beam us out, Scotty.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Shit. Okay. I cast Fly on myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Bye, Tiberius! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I redact that, actually. Is it possible-- I'm at least standing next to him, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I don't have to use a move action right now. I can, like, look at him.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I leap!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Okay, can I give him-- can I take off my Ioun Stone as an action, and swap his crown?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's currently dangling over to this side. Because it's been busted from three different corners and it's precariously hanging.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we'll be okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want some more dice?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, Grog, you're up. Oh no, you're up there, they went. That brings it to the top of the round. Vex, you're up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Take it, take it. Give it to her, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Head to the beach!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, top of the round?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we're at the very top now. At the very end, the new guys burst in and attacked.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to-- (sighs) Is that brain fluid still floating around it? Like, out and stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, we woke it up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But now it's awake, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy shot-- No, actually, you didn't do your turn on that one. I'm sorry, I think we skipped Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should I kill the brain, or try to kill the brain?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: If you can also flee at the same time.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Well, he has to wait for the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The brain is down there in the puddle? In the pool? Is that big scaffolding still hanging over it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so. A few minutes go by, you guys are moving past and over the water channel that's between the north side of the island and the beach where you guys previously set. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You tow Trinket and Vex out behind. As you guys pull off at full speed, the rest of the illithid swarm to the top, you can see about 15 or so get to the front top here, look down at the Elder Brain, look up at the rest of you with this angry look, and as you're pulling away, your eyes adjust to the darkness of the cavern and you look down and you swear you can see hundreds and hundreds of sets of purple glowing eyes just staring up from the city as you all slowly fly away to the far end of the cavern. As you're moving, so are the eyes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sings) We've made some enemies. They're coming after us.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I want to make a note, because I'm way ahead of everybody at this point, as soon as I land on the beach, I cast Circle of Teleportation.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Barring that there's nobody there, but I do that immediately.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You all rush through the portal, one after the other, towards the very end is Grog, you bringing up the rear, holding Kima, you go rushing towards it as it begins to slowly close, this only lasts a round, you barrel through just in time as it closes behind you with a sparking sound.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What is happening right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Stupid wrench.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A few seconds pass, you finish the incantation, you place your hand down on the center of the sigil, this wave of arcane energy blasts off, and suddenly, above this circle, this tearing sound pulls out of the middle of the ether, and this kind of purple shimmering doorway opens above the circle sigil that he crafted on the side of the beach.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: By the blessings of Bahamut, I choose Emon!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, the doorway that he just created takes some sort of a solid form and from what you can see on the other side, there appears to be some sort of low-lit room.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Greyskull!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) Greyskull!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I run right through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Tiberius runs through. Everyone else?

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys have all landed on the beach as he finished casting this, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Run!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Run!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Here within the Lyceum. The hour is late. We are two hours past midnight."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We are affiliated with the king.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, emperor. Just tell the emperor that Vox Machina has returned from Kraghammer, and we have news for him, and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We were on very secret business for the crown, actually. And that is why you weren't informed of our business.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm Tiberius Stormwind. How are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you wink?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm responsible for casting the spell to get us here to begin with.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) With advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That would be a 20-- no. 35.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. He looks to you, as you guys are saying, he--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's not possible. 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 25. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He stands up from the desk and gives you all a look-over and says, "Well, I am Gatekeeper Xanthas, I am the evening keeper of the Traverse Junction here in the-- it's the Traverse Junction."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Gatekeeper?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well. I'm certain the Headmaster would like to know your business in the morning."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That would be a 20-- no. 35.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. He looks to you, as you guys are saying, he--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's not possible. 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 25. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He stands up from the desk and gives you all a look-over and says, "Well, I am Gatekeeper Xanthas, I am the evening keeper of the Traverse Junction here in the-- it's the Traverse Junction."

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Gatekeeper?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Here within the Lyceum. The hour is late. We are two hours past midnight."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I am Percival Fredrickstein Von Musel Klossowski de Rolo III, and, hello, and we would love to report to the emperor of your great hospitality at this unfortunately early hour, and we would look forward to reporting of all of your kindness and good housekeeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I imagine he would be very upset if we were delayed. We come with very grave news.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would hope not to imagine it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You look up and, for the first time in close to a week, you can see stars, you can see a crescent moon, probably just past its single quarter phase. It is a sight for sore eyes right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Love the hat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Guards do not respond to you whatsoever, they just step to the side. Gatekeeper says, "All right, well, here is your way out, have a wonderful evening and do please return for your report on the morrow."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, one more question before you leave, what district are we in right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Erudite Quarter."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Gesundheit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good night." The doors slam (boof) behind you as you guys exit, and you're now--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit, we survived! What was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god! Keyleth just goes down on her knees and starts kissing the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, that could've gone worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we're home.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just want to get in my bed so bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look! Stars!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So. Eventually you all manage to make your way towards the outer wall of Emon to the southern portion of the city. The guards let you through. Two of them recognize you from the Winter's Crest celebration that occurred about seven months beforehand. Don't do that, that's going to end poorly. You make your way around the bend to the large grass hill that is surrounded by the river that skirts the outer southern portion of Greyskull Keep. Looking up, you can see against the moonlight the very welcome sight of your home there, beckoning to you to rest. You make your way to the front gates that surround the outskirts of it, and an iron bell kind of goes off for a second, and as you look up, you hear a voice go, "Who goes there? Speak your mind, or a bolt to the throat you'll find."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: And we still have, if we get to 400, correct, next? Lucas?

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: If we get to 3,400 by the end of the night, we'll give away a whole other kit like this, with the signed stuff, so you get to subscribe and it supports the channel, keeps us running. I'm not going to interrupt these guys, so when we hit the number I'm just going to give it away through the chat room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Awesome, guys. Well done and congrats to whoever ends up getting that, real fast I hope. So, thank you Overlord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, this is in here. Can I throw this? Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pass it off, it's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You get the horn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I hold it for a second?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: No. Oh, I mean in real life. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I was like, don't touch it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, aren't you a sight for sore eyes? It's been nearly a week since you left."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shayne, is that Shayne?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Is it dark right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's dark, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I cast Light. "It's us!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, a light pierces off, and you guys look up and you can see, sitting on kind of the watchtower perch--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or wait, is that Jarett?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you see up there, short, rough red hair, Shayne Tranter, one of the mercenaries you hired--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it is Shayne, I was right the first time!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's got her crossbow ready to go, and she's just kind of sitting back and pointing it at the group, and she goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello! Hi!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hope you remember us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shayne!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're drunk!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We pay you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She laughs. Takes her crossbow, sets it to her side.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We forgot our key!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, it's probably closer to two weeks. Fair enough. Either way. Open the gates! Cordell, open the gates!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shayne, is that Shayne?

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Is it dark right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's dark, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I cast Light. "It's us!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, a light pierces off, and you guys look up and you can see, sitting on kind of the watchtower perch--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or wait, is that Jarett?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you see up there, short, rough red hair, Shayne Tranter, one of the mercenaries you hired--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it is Shayne, I was right the first time!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's got her crossbow ready to go, and she's just kind of sitting back and pointing it at the group, and she goes,

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello! Hi!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hope you remember us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shayne!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're drunk!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We pay you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She laughs. Takes her crossbow, sets it to her side.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We forgot our key!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, aren't you a sight for sore eyes? It's been nearly a week since you left."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Feels like a month.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Feels like three months.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Feels like eleven weeks. It feels like a very long time.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as the gate slowly opens, Cordell walking out, this is the hearty half-orc merc dressed in scale armor, and he has a large sword slung on his back, just shoves it open to about a two-foot distance. "Come on. Welcome home." As each of you guys walk through, he kinda claps you on the back as you walk in. You make your way into the small courtyard leading to-- making your way into Greyskull Keep. Towards the front door, as you get there, the front door opens on its own as you're about ten feet away and peering from the inside of the low-lit interior you see a woman's face, a plump blond woman's face, peek through. This is Laina. Laina goes, "Oh, you're back, fantastic! It's early." And she rubs her face and you see as she pushes the door open a little more, she's wearing her nightgown, and she's excited but still very tired. "Come in, come in, come in, please, please! Who's that?" And points to the large stone statue you're dragging behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hope you remember us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shayne!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're drunk!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We pay you!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She laughs. Takes her crossbow, sets it to her side.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We forgot our key!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, aren't you a sight for sore eyes? It's been nearly a week since you left."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Feels like a month.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Feels like three months.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Feels like eleven weeks. It feels like a very long time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, it's probably closer to two weeks. Fair enough. Either way. Open the gates! Cordell, open the gates!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Cordell? I don't remember the names of any of our guards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Cordell, he's one of the other half-orc guards that you hired when you left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We have Shayne, Cordell, Jarett, Kendrick, and Nitebe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Jarett was the one we appointed as the head guard, right? Captain?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jarett? I think so. I didn't write that part down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't remember about the little fellow.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Our staff is so unappreciated, guys.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Allura. She came by a couple days ago, just to see if you had returned. But I didn't know where you were, and she said she'd try again later."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I love their banter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they're so cute.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I will go back to bed, if that's fine with you."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there any urgent, oppressing news, any visitors that we should know about who came while we were gone, anything before you retire for the evening?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I believe your friend, the mage woman with the blue robes came by once."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Allara?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Back to my quarters." And he shuffles off, goes towards his bed. You guys make your way into the main dining chamber of your Keep, four large round tables set out with the chairs around it. You can see, for the most part, it's been untouched other than a couple of chairs that are set ajar, probably by your mercenary soldiers who've been eating and/or have been keeping up. There's a couple of empty tables set on the side that immediately Laina goes, "I'm so sorry, I guess I should've taken care of this." And she stumbles off towards the kitchen and you guys all eventually find yourselves sitting, sore, exhausted, mildly intoxicated, around these chairs and take a very deep-breathing sigh of relief at being back home here in Emon in Greyskull Keep.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I love their banter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they're so cute.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I will go back to bed, if that's fine with you."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there any urgent, oppressing news, any visitors that we should know about who came while we were gone, anything before you retire for the evening?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I believe your friend, the mage woman with the blue robes came by once."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Allara?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Allura. She came by a couple days ago, just to see if you had returned. But I didn't know where you were, and she said she'd try again later."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Any packages, mail, post?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "None that I know of, no. In fact it's been very quiet."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Quiet is good.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And you do ravenously, and this is the first warm meal you've really truly had in five, six days.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And he's asleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He didn't seem to know anything, I think Allura is the person to go to right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, you need to share it with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Wake up from bed!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's sleeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, let's wait until Allura's here, I think, and we can--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we tell her, do we tell her we have the Horn? Or do we not?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes, we do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why don't we just wake up Tiberius?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius. Little darling!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm still punishing him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm still cuddling him.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Did they wake me up?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No! I'm holding you.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to wake you up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You start to wake up, and then he scritches the side of your cheek and you go right back to sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Damn it, he's so cute. I don't know what to do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Laina comes out with plates for you guys and sets up these--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank. God.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're not pretty, but functional meals of cooked pork, some fine mashed potatoes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I would like to eat.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, it's been ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I undo his Polymorph, I undo his Polymorph.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With what?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: By Polymorph.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You re-Polymorph him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I release Polymorph by using Polymorph?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. It's his incantation.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I spit on Tiberius's head and rub it in vigorously.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, come on. We need to talk to him.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to bite Grog. I am not happy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's like this viscous Grog spit mixed with chunks of pork and mashed potato rubbed in your fur.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, he's nipping! Scanlan. Tiberius is nipping. Please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, fine. He's a human thing again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He's not human at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A dragonborn.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Why did you wake me up? I was so comfy being furry! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I always have scales. It was nice having fur!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I told you. It's nice being cuddly.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: I was so soft.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius, we're sorry to wake you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Tiberius, we're having a lovely breakfast. Tell us a story.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Have I rested? What's going on?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Please, I'd love to see her, it's been too long. All right, I'm going to, is there a room I could rest?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Gives you a look as you're walking in like. "It's good to see you alive, friend."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, more than alive, I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And also, he actually pulled you out of the cavern with one arm while you were stone. Out of the whole place.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, stop, I don't like to brag.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She stands up and kinda wipes the food off her chin, clutches her symbol, and then steps right before you, looking up towards your face and says, "I thank you, friend Grog."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Friendzoned!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And then reaches out and gives you a big hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus he decided not to put you in the magical bag when you were a statue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She releases Grog slightly, and kinda gives you a keen look and goes, "Also appreciated."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, well, you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, thank god.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you go rest? We'll summon Allura and we'll continue the conversation from there, I guess.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, you should. All right. Rona Konandario. "A friend showed me Critical Role a few weeks ago, just as our long-time group of friends started our game. It must've been destiny. I love everyone's genuine feelings towards all the aspects of the game. Expect fanart in the future. Much love." Donated $10. Thank you so much, Runa Konandario. Wheelyfactoids donated $3 also, same fellow, "Also, if you guys could come to Salt Lake City Comic Con in Utah, look me up and we'll go to some Cold Stone. Critter for life." RJCanuck donated $25. "Mercy-- Percy for MVP." No mercy for Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's an important thing, return postage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, return postage, don't make me pay for postage back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Otherwise, hey, free copy for us, which is really cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Take the disc out, send back the case.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Norsiraya donated $5. "I love you guys so much. I had my first D&D game last Saturday. Thanks, Marisha, for naming my half-elf druid Kalina."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it was Kalina!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ended up burning the chest hairs off a pirate. I plan to burn the chest hairs off of many more creatures in the future. Vox Machina!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ZAC
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to have to remember that move.
